  • Kennis van artificial intelligence, predictive analysis of Deepen/of Machine learning (libraries zoals TensorFlow, Keras, sklearn, Caffe, Torch);
  • Kennis van en ervaring met één of meerdere analytics tools zoals R, Spark, Storm, HIVE, QlikView, Power BI, Splunk, MatLab, of SAS Suite etc.;
  • Kennis van en ervaring met databasetechnologieën (Hadoop, SQL NoSQL, NewSQL etc.);
  • Ervaring met het visualiseren van data met behulp van de laatste state-of-the-art technologieën;
  • Uitstekende communicatieve vaardigheden in zowel Nederlands als Engels.


Waarom CIMSOLUTIONS?

  • 15 keer Top Employer!
  • Uitstekend salaris;
  • Vrije keuze leaseauto;
  • € 5000,- opleidingsbudget;
  • Aantrekkelijke bonussen;
  • Veel sociale evenementen;
  • Uitdagende projecten;
  • Gevarieerde opdrachten;
  • Gerenommeerde klanten.


Ben je overtuigd?

We willen graag kennis met je maken. Solliciteer vrijblijvend of neem contact met ons op via:

  • Mail: recruitment@cimsolutions.nl;
  • Telefoon: 0499-366 000;
  • of bezoek onze website: www.cimsolutions.nl/werken-bij/

Title: Senior Data Scientist
Description:
Samba is a media intelligence company. We know what the world is watching, reading, and thinking about — in real time, at scale, across every screen. Our data exists with the consent of over a billion people, organized into the most complete picture of consumer attention ever built. The biggest brands in the world use that picture to make smarter decisions. We think it’s the most interesting data asset on the planet, because it’s the most culturally relevant. 







We are hiring a Senior Data Scientist in Amsterdam to help shape Samba TV's data science function for the agentic era of advertising. You will define modeling methodology, build production ML systems, and apply modern AI and agentic capabilities across our data products.




You bring 8+ years of experience, deep expertise in machine learning and modern AI, and the technical range to take methodology from research through production deployment. You are an active collaborator with engineering, product, and partner teams, and an advocate for rigorous, defensible modeling practice.







What You'll Do
Modeling and ML Development






Own end-to-end delivery of data science projects, from problem scoping through production deployment.








Define and ship modeling methodology that powers Samba's data products, including model selection, evaluation frameworks, and reproducibility standards.








Apply solid command of core ML and statistics (regression, classification, clustering, model evaluation, experimental design, causal inference) to billion-row, real-world data.








Build production-quality Python and PySpark on Databricks: well-tested, documented, reusable.








Partner with Data Engineering to define data requirements, validate pipelines, and ensure model inputs are reliable and production-ready.






AI and Agentic Capabilities






Build and operate advanced AI systems using modern methodologies: retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), LLM-augmented modeling and Graph Neural Networks. Design AI-driven modeling approaches that improve as signals evolve, supporting agentic decision-making at platform scale.








Integrate LLMs and agentic workflows into production ML pipelines where they extend modeling capability and unlock new product surfaces.






Technical Contribution and Collaboration






Drive technical design for modeling components within your scope, producing clear solution documents covering problem statement, approach, metrics, and trade-offs.








Translate business requirements into modeling solutions in close collaboration with product, engineering, and go-to-market partners.








Uphold high standards for production-quality data science.








Mentor data scientists on the team through structured feedback, pairing, and design review.






MLOps and Production Practice






Establish and operate MLOps practices: experiment tracking, pipeline orchestration (Airflow), model monitoring, retraining workflows, and reproducibility standards.








Apply privacy-compliant data handling practices, including GDPR, CCPA, and Samba's data governance policies.











Who You Are
Required






8+ years of hands-on data science experience with a Bachelor's degree in Statistics, Data Science, Computer Science, Mathematics, or a related quantitative field (or 6+ years with a Master's, 3+ years with a PhD, or equivalent).








Demonstrated ability to own and deliver complex, multi-sprint data science projects from problem scoping through production deployment.








Solid command of core ML and statistics, including neural networks, regression, classification, clustering, model evaluation, experimental design, and causal inference, applied to billion-row datasets.








Track record of building methodology, not just applying it: data analysis, model selection, evaluation frameworks, and solid documentation of decision processes








Production experience with vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, Milvus, pgvector, or equivalent) for retrieval, matching, or inference at scale.








Advanced Python with production-quality, tested code; strong SQL and PySpark on billion-row datasets.








Databricks, Delta Lake, and job orchestration (Airflow); hands-on production experience on AWS, GCP, and Databricks.








MLOps proficiency: experiment tracking, pipeline orchestration, model monitoring, reproducible deployment.








Experience designing and operating agentic AI systems in production: prompt engineering, agent orchestration, tool use, or integration of LLMs into ML pipelines.








A clear communicator who translates technical work into design docs, user stories, and cross-functional conversations.








An active mentor who invests in others, gives direct feedback, and raises the bar for the team as a whole.






Preferred






Knowledge graph design (RDF, OWL, SPARQL, or equivalent graph frameworks), Natural Language Processing, Background in ad tech, CTV/OTT, ACR, audience activation, identity resolution, or measurement methodologies.








Experience with causal inference (A/B testing, synthetic control, uplift modeling).














Base salary is just one component of Samba total compensation package for employees. Other rewards may include bonuses, short-term incentives, and long-term incentives. In addition, Samba provides health insurance, wellness offerings, life and disability insurance, a retirement savings plan, paid holidays and paid time off (PTO), and other employee benefits.




Samba is an equal opportunity employer. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.  We strive to empower connection with one another, reflect the communities we serve, and tackle meaningful projects that make a real impact.




 




Samba may collect personal information directly from you, as a job applicant, Samba may also receive personal information from third parties, for example, in connection with a background, employment or reference check, in accordance with the applicable law. For further details, please see Samba's Applicant Privacy Policy. For residents of the EU , Samba Inc. is the data controller.




We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

Title: Data Scientist AI
HTML:
Company Description

Varrlyn is a consulting firm which was founded in 2010 and is based in The Netherlands. We help financial institutions with system implementations and provide some serious application support, concentrating on the way they process transactions and deploy reporting applications.

Varrlyn has a proven track record: we have worked for financial institutions in Amsterdam, Brussels, London, Paris, New York, Frankfurt, and Sydney. We help improve cost efficiency, simplify application architecture, optimize time to market, enhance straight-through processing, and ensure compliance with financial regulations. In other words: You do the deal, we’ll do the project.

Job Description

The Responsible GenAI squad drives the development and implementation of Generative AI solutions that enables the client to apply AI effectively in practice. These solutions enhance the customer journey, streamline data processing, answer internal staff queries and generate insights and reports to facilitate workflows. To accelerate innovation, the team also develops APIs that help other teams build GenAI solutions faster and more efficiently. 

As Data Scientist, you will contribute to building, monitoring and optimizing the performance of GenAI solutions across diverse use cases within our client. You’ll be at the forefront of creating tools that tackle complex challenges, improve efficiency and unlock new opportunities. Your work will involve exploring topics such as responsible GenAI, performance monitoring, red teaming and evaluating GenAI models for fairness and bias. 

Practical examples

  • Work directly with (internal) customers to learn how processes and systems work;
  • Be accountable for building responsible and cost effective GenAI solutions for millions of customers;
  • Enabling the performance and monitoring of the reusable GenAI building blocks can be used by 100+ tech teams;
  • Design and build responsible and cost effective GenAI solutions;
  • Collaborate with team members to solve critical or complex problems.

Top Responsibilities

  • Design and build responsible GenAI via performance monitoring, red teaming and evaluating GenAI models for fairness and bias;
  • Contribute to building, monitoring and optimizing the performance of GenAI solutions;
  • Join-forces with your peers, experts and stakeholders to provide business value to our clients customers.

Qualifications

Technical skills and experience:

  • You have at least 5 or more years of experience working as a Data Scientist;
  • You have strong programming skills (software engineering experience is a plus) and are proficient in Python;
  • You have a solid understanding of NLP and LLMs and experience in building Generative AI applications;

Additional Information

Acquisition in response to this vacancy is not appreciated.

Title: Machine Learning Engineer I
Description:
Suas tarefas

Descrição da Vaga

A Nicolab é uma empresa de tecnologia em saúde que busca conectar a inteligência humana e a inteligência artificial para revolucionar o atendimento de emergência. Estamos procurando um(a) Engenheiro(a) de Machine Learning I talentoso(a) e apaixonado(a), com uma abordagem centrada no cliente para criar produtos de saúde que gerem um impacto altamente positivo na vida e na saúde das pessoas. Acreditamos que a combinação entre inteligência artificial e humana revolucionará o atendimento de emergência, e trabalhamos todos os dias para tornar isso realidade. Fundada em 2015 como uma spin-off do Amsterdam University Medical Center, nossa origem em pesquisa continua guiando a forma como pensamos e trabalhamos. Temos uma equipe diversa, composta por profissionais de várias partes do mundo, incluindo pesquisadores, desenvolvedores e especialistas médicos experientes, que garantem que nossos produtos e serviços atendam às necessidades de nossos clientes. Estamos inicialmente enfrentando um dos maiores desafios da medicina: o AVC (Acidente Vascular Cerebral), principal causa de incapacidade permanente, garantindo que cada paciente receba o tratamento adequado no momento certo. Assista ao vídeo para saber mais.

Como nosso(a) Engenheiro(a) de Machine Learning, você será um membro fundamental da equipe e desenvolverá algoritmos para aplicações de imagens médicas. Trabalhará em estreita colaboração com outros engenheiros de machine learning no desenvolvimento de biomarcadores para imagens de Tomografia Computadorizada (TC), com engenheiros de software na implantação dos modelos em infraestrutura de nuvem e com especialistas clínicos na validação dos algoritmos. Estamos procurando alguém curioso(a), com vontade de aprender e evoluir continuamente, para ajudar a construir dispositivos médicos baseados em inteligência artificial que promovam mudanças positivas e significativas no mundo.

Principais Responsabilidades


Trabalhar com outros Engenheiros(as) de Machine Learning no desenvolvimento e manutenção de algoritmos para diagnóstico de AVC, principalmente com imagens de Tomografia Computadorizada (TC)
Realizar pesquisa bibliográfica, implementar e adaptar algoritmos de deep learning e visão computacional de acordo com os requisitos do produto
Colaborar com engenheiros de backend/cloud para colocar modelos de machine learning em produção em GCP/AWS
Desenvolver testes unitários
Projetar, implementar e testar pipelines de dados complexos para suportar o treinamento e a validação de algoritmos.
Criar documentação técnica sobre os algoritmos e as intuições de design
Analisar e extrair insights de dados médicos complexos


Seu perfil

Qualificações


Deve ser capaz de se comunicar profissionalmente em inglês
Bons conhecimentos de desenvolvimento em Python e em bibliotecas científicas, como NumPy e SciPy
0–2 anos de experiência com deep learning aplicado à visão computacional
Doutorado (PhD) seria um diferencial
Experiência prática com frameworks de machine learning, como PyTorch
Experiência com detecção de objetos 2D e 3D
Experiência na construção de produtos baseados em deep learning e sua implantação em produção
Experiência com aprendizado por reforço aplicado à visão computacional e PLN (Processamento de Linguagem Natural)
Experiência com Docker
Conhecimento do protocolo DICOM
Experiência com SimpleITK
Experiência com cloud pública, como GCP e AWS


Porque nós?

O que oferecemos


Oportunidade de causar um impacto real na vida de pacientes
Ambiente de trabalho estimulante com uma equipe motivada
Modalidades de contratação flexíveis: meio período, período integral ou freelancer
Horário de trabalho flexível
Equipamento de trabalho (laptop e home office/IT equipment*)
Plano de opções de ações para funcionários (ESOP)*
Programas corporativos, incluindo indicação de funcionários com recompensas
Oportunidades de aprendizado e desenvolvimento, incluindo treinamentos internos, coaching, certificações profissionais e acesso a mais de 22.000 cursos no LinkedIn Learning Solutions, entre outros
Todos os benefícios estão sujeitos a critérios de elegibilidade específicos.


Application Process (em inglês)


Interview with Recruiter/HR
Interview with Hiring Manager
Technical assessment with Peers (no managers present)
Prior employment verification check (reference/background check)
Interview with Executive


Sobre nós

A Nicolab foi fundada em 2015 após o amplamente reconhecido MR CLEAN trial, o primeiro ensaio clínico randomizado a comprovar o benefício do tratamento endovascular. Esse estudo levou a uma mudança global de paradigma no cuidado e na triagem do AVC agudo, resultando no modelo hospitalar “Hub and Spoke”.

Os principais pesquisadores do MR CLEAN e cofundadores da empresa, Dr. Merel Boers e Dr. Renan Sales Barros, reconheceram a necessidade de uma solução de inteligência artificial para revolucionar o tratamento do AVC. Com acesso exclusivo ao conjunto de dados heterogêneo do MR CLEAN, a Nicolab desenvolveu o StrokeViewer. O StrokeViewer fornece os algoritmos de IA mais precisos para diagnosticar pacientes com AVC em todo o mundo.Nossa base é profundamente enraizada em pesquisa clínica de ponta, razão pela qual continuamos a investir e contribuir significativamente para a pesquisa, garantindo que a Nicolab permaneça na vanguarda da inovação e da melhoria dos resultados para pacientes com AVC.

Embora a Nicolab continue a operar com sede em Amsterdã, nos Países Baixos, temos orgulho de ser uma empresa australiana de capital fechado, com uma presença global em expansão.

Visite nosso site: Nicolab.com

Title: Data Analytics Specialist (Data Analist / Data Scientist)
HTML:
Als Data Analytics Specialist / Data Analist / Data Scientist ben je verantwoordelijk voor het verzamelen, analyseren en interpreteren van data om inzichten te verkrijgen en te gebruiken voor datagedreven besluitvorming bij of voor onze gerenommerde klanten waaronder Belastingdienst, Gemeente Den Haag, diverse ministeries, Centraal Justitieel Incassobureau of VGZ. Afhankelijk van het ervaringsniveau ligt de focus op verschillende aspecten van data-analyse en data science.


Waarom past deze vacature bij jou?

Je bent analytisch, nieuwsgierig en gedreven om maatschappelijke impact te maken met data. Je schakelt gemakkelijk tussen techniek en beleid en weet abstracte analyses te vertalen naar concrete inzichten. Je draagt graag bij aan kennisdeling, continu verbeteren en datagedreven werken binnen onze klanten. Je vindt het leuk om kennis te delen met collega’s, klanten en vakgenoten. Je voelt je thuis in een informele, collegiale en professionele omgeving, waar de aandacht voor de klant en voor de medewerker centraal staan.


Wat ga je doen?

  • Verzamelen, opschonen, transformeren en valideren van data uit verschillende bronnen.
  • Toepassen van statistische methoden en data-analyse technieken om patronen, trends en inzichten uit data te halen.
  • Ontwikkelen van geavanceerde machine learning modellen.
  • Resultaten van analyses visualiseren en presenteren in heldere dashboards, rapporten en presentaties.
  • Adviseren over datagedreven besluitvorming aan management en stakeholders.
  • Coachen en (bege)leiden van medior en junior Data Specialisten.
  • Effectief samenwerken met Data Engineers, Data Stewards, business analisten en andere stakeholders.


Wat kun jij van ons verwachten?

  • Een vast dienstverband voor onbepaalde tijd, een max. salaris van € 8.000,- bonusregeling, leaseauto, pensioenregeling en maandelijkse onkostenvergoeding;
  • Opdrachtkeuzevrijheid: Jij bepaalt in overleg waar je aan werkt, met de begeleiding van een personal coach;
  • Per jaar € 5.000,- opleidingsbudget en daarnaast ook nog eens 5-10 dagen studietijd;
  • Kennissessies met vakgenoten en inhoudelijke events;
  • Minimaal 25 vakantiedagen, met de mogelijkheid om extra dagen op te bouwen of te verkopen;
  • Sociale events zoals sportdagen, weekend weg en gezellige borrels;
  • Een vestiging bij jou in de buurt.


Jouw ontwikkeling, onze prioriteit

CIMSOLUTIONS biedt jou een omgeving waarin je kunt doorgroeien naar Data Architect / Data Consultant. Je krijgt ruimte, ondersteuning en middelen om je te specialiseren en te excelleren. We bieden toegang tot diverse opleidingen en ondersteunen je met ervaren collega's. Onze slogan "Learn, create and make it work" is niet zomaar een zin – het is de kern van hoe wij werken en ontwikkelen.


CIMSOLUTIONS heeft een actief diversiteitsbeleid en streeft naar een evenwichtige verdeling van professionals naar o.a. leeftijd, gender, etnische achtergrond en cultuur, arbeidsvermogen, kennis en competenties. Hierbij benadrukken wij dat wij gelijke kansen belangrijk vinden in de selectie.


Wat breng jij mee?

  • Een afgeronde wo-opleiding in Data Science, AI, Informatiekunde, Business Analytics of vergelijkbaar;
  • Minimaal drie jaar aantoonbare ervaring in een Agile omgeving met het analyseren en interpreteren van data en het vertalen van inzichten naar concrete adviezen;
  • Vaardig in het ontwerpen van dashboards en visualisaties die inzichten helder presenteren;
  • Diepgaande kennis van statistische methoden, machine learning technieken en algoritmen;
  • Ervaring met het ontwikkelen en trainen van machine learning modellen;
  • Kennis van actuele ontwikkelingen op het gebied van data-analyse, data-ethiek en relevante wet- en regelgeving;
  • Uitstekende communicatieve vaardigheden, zowel mondeling als schriftelijk;
  • Voor senior functies ervaring met het leiden van data science projecten en kennisdeling;
  • AI-affiniteit is een pré.

Title: AI Data Scientist
Description:
Only applicants who speak dutch will be reviewed




Deze specialistische rol richt zich op het ontwikkelen en toepassen van AI en data science oplossingen die directe waarde leveren voor de organisatie, klanten en eindgebruikers. Je fungeert als verbindende schakel tussen business, IT en centrale stakeholders en vertaalt complexe data en modellen naar concrete, toepasbare inzichten. De rol combineert analytische diepgang met advies, implementatie en samenwerking binnen een internationale context.




Over de rol

In deze rol identificeer je AI-toepassingen en beoordeelt je de waarde en haalbaarheid daarvan, denk aan impact op winst, klanttevredenheid en processen. Je ontwikkelt voorspellende modellen met machine learning en statistische technieken en analyseert grote hoeveelheden gestructureerde en ongestructureerde data om strategische en operationele vraagstukken op te lossen.




Je begeleidt het volledige traject van idee tot implementatie en doorloopt daarbij de vastgestelde governance stappen voor AI en data science use cases. Daarnaast signaleer je RPA-mogelijkheden, coördineer je aanvragen en onderzoek je hoe AI-technologieën deze processen naar een hoger niveau kunnen tillen.




Je ondersteunt de organisatie bij AI-gerelateerde tools zoals Copilot en Power Automate, verzorgt trainingen, adviseert over effectieve prompts en berekent de concrete voordelen daarvan. Experimenteren met nieuwe technologieën om de data science capabilities binnen de organisatie te blijven ontwikkelen is een vast onderdeel van de functi




Over jou

HBO of WO werk en denkniveau
Minimaal 2 jaar ervaring binnen AI en data science, ervaring met change of transformatie is een pre
Ervaring met tools en technologieën zoals Python, R, SQL, Git, Databricks, Dataiku, Domino, VS Code en data visualisatie tooling
Kennis van grote databronnen en datamodellen zoals Hadoop, Spark en SQL
Ervaring met het ontwikkelen van modellen, simulaties, scenario analyses en algoritmes
Sterk analytisch vermogen en in staat om complexe materie helder uit te leggen aan niet-technische stakeholders
Proactief, gestructureerd en resultaatgericht
Vloeiend in Nederlands en Engels in woord en geschrift
Woonachtig in Nederland




Werkomgeving

Je maakt onderdeel uit van een team dat zich richt op business transformatie en procesverbetering. Je werkt samen met collega's binnen data, technologie en efficiency disciplines in een professionele, collegiale en multidisciplinaire setting.




Over Levy Professionals

Sinds 2000 leveren wij professionele oplossingen aan organisaties variërend van tech start ups tot gevestigde ondernemingen. Vanuit onze kantoren in Amsterdam en Londen hebben wij een internationaal en lokaal netwerk opgebouwd van hooggekwalificeerde professionals en contractors, gedreven door de focus op het verbinden van expertise aan complexe opdrachten. Onze aanpak is gebaseerd op langdurige relaties en professionele integriteit.

Title: Data Analytics Specialist (Data Analist / Data Scientist)
HTML:
Als Data Analytics Specialist / Data Analist / Data Scientist ben je verantwoordelijk voor het verzamelen, analyseren en interpreteren van data om inzichten te verkrijgen en te gebruiken voor datagedreven besluitvorming bij of voor onze gerenommerde klanten waaronder Belastingdienst, Gemeente Den Haag, diverse ministeries, Centraal Justitieel Incassobureau of VGZ. Afhankelijk van het ervaringsniveau ligt de focus op verschillende aspecten van data-analyse en data science.


Waarom past deze vacature bij jou?

Je bent analytisch, nieuwsgierig en gedreven om maatschappelijke impact te maken met data. Je schakelt gemakkelijk tussen techniek en beleid en weet abstracte analyses te vertalen naar concrete inzichten. Je draagt graag bij aan kennisdeling, continu verbeteren en datagedreven werken binnen onze klanten. Je vindt het leuk om kennis te delen met collega’s, klanten en vakgenoten. Je voelt je thuis in een informele, collegiale en professionele omgeving, waar de aandacht voor de klant en voor de medewerker centraal staan.


Wat ga je doen?

  • Verzamelen, opschonen, transformeren en valideren van data uit verschillende bronnen.
  • Toepassen van statistische methoden en data-analyse technieken om patronen, trends en inzichten uit data te halen.
  • Ontwikkelen van geavanceerde machine learning modellen.
  • Resultaten van analyses visualiseren en presenteren in heldere dashboards, rapporten en presentaties.
  • Adviseren over datagedreven besluitvorming aan management en stakeholders.
  • Coachen en (bege)leiden van medior en junior Data Specialisten.
  • Effectief samenwerken met Data Engineers, Data Stewards, business analisten en andere stakeholders.


Wat kun jij van ons verwachten?

  • Een vast dienstverband voor onbepaalde tijd, een max. salaris van € 8.000,- bonusregeling, leaseauto, pensioenregeling en maandelijkse onkostenvergoeding;
  • Opdrachtkeuzevrijheid: Jij bepaalt in overleg waar je aan werkt, met de begeleiding van een personal coach;
  • Per jaar € 5.000,- opleidingsbudget en daarnaast ook nog eens 5-10 dagen studietijd;
  • Kennissessies met vakgenoten en inhoudelijke events;
  • Minimaal 25 vakantiedagen, met de mogelijkheid om extra dagen op te bouwen of te verkopen;
  • Sociale events zoals sportdagen, weekend weg en gezellige borrels;
  • Een vestiging bij jou in de buurt.

Title: Data Scientist - AI Strategy Team
Description:
At a glance

Are you ready to use your Data Science skills to make a real impact in the Finance & Risk Data Domain? Do you thrive on Python, GenAI, Spark, Databricks, ML and Azure? If so, then the role of Data Scientist in the Common Data team is an interesting position for you and we’d love to meet you!

Your job


You don’t just build smart AI solutions, you shape the future of how we work.
You spot opportunities before others do, experiment iteratively, involve stakeholders from the start, and turn promising ideas into valuable, scalable (Gen)AI products.
We run several (Gen)AI applications, from data quality optimization models to automated reporting and signalling clients in distress, all used daily by colleagues across the organization.



Working environment

The Finance & Risk Data Domain is part of Finance & Risk Business Grids (F&RBG), and plays an active role for all the Finance and Risk departments. We employ 200+ international professionals with different backgrounds who are driven to bring risk data management to a structurally higher level. Our aim is to generate reliable risk data on time. We do this by improving the risk data itself, data systems and data processes. We work with an Agile operating model. Our Finance and Risk Data Domain consists of 7 departments where the atmosphere is dynamic, open and informal.

You are part of the AI Strategy Team in the Centre of Expertise Advanced Analytics & Artificial Intelligence department. You will report to the Business Lead CoE AA & AI.

Your profile

You have an interest and experience in AA & AI. You are a passionate, hard-working professional with an eye for details. You are able to execute assignments independently as well as interact directly with stakeholders when it comes to day-to-day matters.

Do you think you fit in with us? Check your profile:

You are a curious, pragmatic developer with 3+ years of experience in Data Science or AI Engineering. You:


Translate business challenges into workable AI models effortlessly and explain complex topics with clarity and impact
Enjoy working in multidisciplinary teams and are confident collaborating with (senior) stakeholders
Have a learning mindset with a willingness to continue to grow and a broad interest in a variety of data science topics
Are pragmatic and look for the simplest solution first
Take ownership of your work and work in a structured way
Have hands‑on experience with Python, Spark, SQL, Databricks, Azure, basic ML-models, pipeline structuring and optimization techniques
You are capable of giving and asking for feedback.
You have worked in and/or with Scrum/DevOps teams.
Excellent oral and written communication skills in English with strong stakeholder management skills.



We are offering

There are plenty of career opportunities to grow personally and professionally, which mainly depend on your own ambitions and interests.

In addition, we offer:


The Benefit Budget is 11% of your salary. The Benefit Budget allows you to acquire additional employment benefits. If you make no purchases or reservations in the Benefit Shop in a given month, you are paid one twelfth of your Benefit Budget that month.
Five weeks of vacation per year. You have the option to purchase an additional four weeks per year.
Personal development Budget of € 1,000 per year, which you can accumulate up to € 3,000.
Possibility to work from home (in consultation with your team and depending on your position).
An annual public transport pass with free public transportation throughout the Netherlands.
An excellent pension scheme.



Interested?

Do not hesitate to approach us for more details, or apply directly! For more information contact Nasim Mehrshid, Business Lead CoE AA&AI, via email: nasim.mehrshid@nl.abnamro.com. We look forward to meeting you!

Your Future: Inclusive, Innovative, Sustainable

At ABN AMRO, we believe in "Banking for better, for generations to come." Equal opportunities for everyone are a crucial foundation, as we strive for an inclusive culture where all employees feel seen, heard, and valued. Our vision of being a personal bank in the digital age aligns perfectly with the demand for surprising insights and innovative solutions, born from a diverse interplay of cultures and experiences. We focus on customer experience, sustainability, and building a future-proof bank, conducting annual reviews to ensure equal pay for equal work. Join a bank that embraces ingenuity and ambition, and make an impact with us for a better future.

If you want to apply for the B-Able or Reboot program, make sure to mention it both in the title and the content of your resume.

Disclaimer external recruitment agencies

External recruitment agencies need to have a signed agreement with ABN AMRO BANK N.V., executed by a Talent Acquisition Specialist, when submitting a resume to a vacancy. No unsolicited services or offers, please.

Title: Data Scientist (Supply Chain), Singapore
Description:
Date: 17 Jun 2026

Country: Singapore

Location:

MarinaOne, SG

Function: Digital & Information Technology

About Us

As a leading provider of high-quality food and beverage ingredients, we work with farming communities across the globe to grow, source and produce ingredients that are good for consumers, farmers, and the world around us. We supply household food brands and manufacturers worldwide with cocoa, coffee, dairy, nuts and spices ingredients which are often grown on our own farms and estates and sourced from hundreds of thousands of farmers across ~50 countries. Along with our diverse manufacturing and innovation capabilities, this means we can provide ingredients for a range of products, from a plant-based latte mix to an almond based snack bar or a dairy-free ice cream.  Making a positive impact on people and planet is a core component of our Purpose, to be the change for good food and a healthy future. With a deep-rooted presence in the countries where our ingredients are grown, we are closer to farmers, enabling better quality, and more reliable, traceable, and transparent supply. And whoever we’re with, whatever we’re doing, we always make it real.

The data scientist is responsible to provide descriptive, diagnostic, predictive, and prescriptive analytics for ofi’s business operations including manufacturing, procurement, sales, consumer insights, sustainability, trading, supply chain, etc.

Key Responsibilities


Work closely with business users in analysing large and/or complex data sets, identifying patterns, and developing algorithms to extract insights.
Designing and implementing machine learning models to solve complex business problems. This includes selecting appropriate algorithms, feature engineering, model training, and evaluation.
Develop and apply optimization techniques such as linear programming, mixed-integer programming, and simulation-based optimization to improve decision-making in supply chain, manufacturing, and logistics.
Create compelling visualizations that communicate the results of data analysis to both technical and non-technical stakeholders. Use visualization tools such as Power BI or Tableau to create interactive dashboards and reports.
Managing data science projects from conception to completion. This includes scoping projects, setting timelines, managing resources, and communicating project status to stakeholders.
Maintaining and monitoring analytical models after production deployment.
Thought leadership including staying up to date with the latest developments in data science. Continuous engagement with business users to update them on potential opportunities of data science initiatives for their business.


Qualifications And Skills


MS/PhD in computer science, statistics, or operations research or related technical discipline (e.g. math).
Minimum 5 to 8 years of work experience in a statistical and/or data science role, with deep knowledge of machine learning, statistics, and optimization.
Preferred programming experience: Python & SQL with considerable experience with a wide range of tools including SparkML, H2O, FlinkML, TensorFlow, Pandas, R and Matlab.
Proficient in working with large and complex data sets using modern data platforms such as Snowflake and distributed data processing tools like PySpark.
Hands-on experience with simulation and optimization modeling using tools such as Gurobi.
Data visualization experience in Power BI and/or Tableau.
Excellent written and verbal communication skills along with strong desire to work in cross-functional teams.
Strategic mindset and the ability to identify opportunities to use data to drive business growth. You should be able to think creatively and identify innovative solutions to complex problems.
Ability to lead end-to-end data science projects and work with business leadership to quickly turn insights into actions.

About Us

As a leading provider of high-quality food and beverage ingredients, we work with farming communities across the globe to grow, source and produce ingredients that are good for consumers, farmers, and the world around us. Title: Data scientist Business Banking NL
Description:
Would you like to shape how ING Business Banking understands and influences customer behaviour across the end‑to‑end customer journey? Are you energized by complex data, advanced analytics, and turning insights into real business impact? Then this role is for you!

The team

The Center of Expertise Pricing Business Banking is part of Business Development, a central BBNL department working for all business banking products and segments. With the strategic product-price positioning, we impact the results of the Domestic Bank Business Banking Netherlands, and customer behaviour, credit and market risk, and perception of our customers and society. As CoE Pricing we have a holistic view on Business Banking products and segments covering savings, payments and lending for small to midsized corporates.

Customer behavioural modelling and Insights Chapter

You will be part of the Customer behavioural modelling and Insights Chapter. This is a newly established squad designed to understand our customers’ behaviour. The focus areas are on behaviour modelling, customer segmentation and price elasticity. You will have the opportunity to build analytical solutions, shape frameworks and best practices from the ground up.

Role And Responsibilities



Develop advanced analytics solutions and models to drive data-informed commercial decisions across Business Banking.
Collaborate with subject matter experts to bring models into production.
Support business in understanding customer behaviour through data.
Actively engage with stakeholders.




How To Succeed



Proactive and result driven.
Highly motivated to solve complex problems with a continuous learning mindset.
Someone who enjoys working cooperatively with others as part of a team.
Comfortable in dynamic multi-matrix environments.




Required Skills



At least 3 years of experience developing advanced analytics solutions, ideally in the financial sector.
Strong experience writing clean, readable, well documented Python and SQL code suitable for production environments.
Affinity with panel data / time series models, linear and non-linear regressions, time series analysis, clustering, and hypothesis testing.
Able to tell a clear story with data and to explain findings to business stakeholders.
Hands-on experience with PySpark, BigQuery, SAS, MS Azure DevOps and GCP is a plus.
Knowledge of pricing domain is a strong advantage.
Solid educational background in mathematics, statistics or econometrics (Master’s or PhD degree level preferred).
Excellent written and oral communication skills in both technical and business contexts. Fluency in spoken and written English. Dutch is a plus.




Rewards And Benefits

We want to make sure that it’s possible for you to strike the right balance between your career and your private life. Find out more about our employment conditions.

The Benefits Of Working With Us At ING Include



25-28 vacation days depending on contract
Pension scheme
13th month salary
8% Holiday payment
Hybrid working
Personal growth and challenging work with endless possibilities
An informal working environment with innovative colleagues




About Us

Curious about how ING empowers people and businesses to move forward?

Discover what we do and what we can offer you.

Questions?

Please visit our Frequently Asked Questions section to find some answers on questions you might have. If you're questions are not answered, you can also contact the recruiter attached to the advertisement. Want to apply directly? Please upload your CV and motivation letter by clicking the ‘Apply’ button

Title: Data Scientist
HTML:
Als Data Scientist lever je inzichten uit gegevens door het analyseproces te optimaliseren en visuele gegevensrepresentaties te presenteren. Je zoekt, beheert en voegt meerdere gegevensbronnen samen en zorgt voor consistentie van gegevenssets. Je identificeert de wiskundige modellen, selecteert en optimaliseert de algoritmen om bedrijfswaarde te leveren door middel van inzichten. Je stelt patronen vast en beveelt manieren aan om gegevens toe te passen.


Waarom past deze vacature bij jou?

Jij wilt jezelf blijven ontwikkelen en dat zit in ons DNA! Met jouw inzicht in cijfers, data en techniek leg je elke complexiteit simpel uit aan de klant. Klanttevredenheid is belangrijk voor je, dus je luistert goed en geeft inzichtelijke antwoorden die de klant het vertrouwen geeft dat het probleem wordt opgelost. Aan de hand van de informatiebehoefte van jouw stakeholders ontwikkel, test en implementeer je data science-modellen en help je collega’s om de mogelijkheden die schuilen in de rijke data bij onze gerenommeerde klanten, optimaal te benutten. Natuurlijk houd je daarbij de ontwikkelingen in het vak goed in de gaten. Krijg jij energie van het ontdekken van nieuwe kansen met data science? Je voelt je thuis in een informele, collegiale en professionele sfeer waar de aandacht voor de klant en voor de medewerker centraal staan.


Wat kun jij van ons verwachten?

  • Naast een dienstverband voor onbepaalde tijd, een max. salaris van € 8.000, bonusregeling, leaseauto, pensioenregeling en maandelijkse onkostenvergoeding;
  • € 5.000,- opleidingsbudget en daarnaast 5-10 dagen studietijd;
  • Kennissessies met andere SIG Data Analytics en Competence Center Data Analyse, Big data en BI;
  • 25 vakantiedagen en snel oplopend tot 28 vakantiedagen per jaar;
  • Het aan- of verkopen van vakantiedagen;
  • Regelmatig sociale uitjes zoals sportdagen, weekendjes weg en gezellige borrels.


Jouw ontwikkeling, onze prioriteit

We bieden jou persoonlijke ontwikkeling aan en zo werk je aan jouw carrière. Learn, create and make it work is niet alleen onze slogan, maar is ons DNA. Als Data Scientist kun je doorgroeien naar diverse rollen, zoals Data Science Consultant, Business Analist, Senior Consultant.


CIMSOLUTIONS heeft een actief diversiteitsbeleid en streeft naar een evenwichtige verdeling van professionals naar o.a. leeftijd, gender, etnische achtergrond en cultuur, arbeidsvermogen, kennis en competenties. Hierbij benadrukken wij dat wij gelijke kansen belangrijk vinden in de selectie.


Wat breng jij mee?

  • Een afgeronde HBO/WO opleiding met een sterk ICT-component;
  • Ervaring met het structureren en analyseren van grote hoeveelheden data om daarin relevante inzichten te ontdekken;
  • Kennis van artificial intelligence, predictive analysis of Deepen/of Machine learning (libraries zoals TensorFlow, Keras, sklearn, Caffe, Torch);
  • Kennis van en ervaring met één of meerdere analytics tools zoals R, Spark, Storm, HIVE, QlikView, Power BI, Splunk, MatLab, of SAS Suite etc.;
  • Kennis van en ervaring met databasetechnologieën (Hadoop, SQL NoSQL, NewSQL etc.);
  • Ervaring met het visualiseren van data met behulp van de laatste state-of-the-art technologieën;
  • Uitstekende communicatieve vaardigheden in zowel Nederlands als Engels.

Title: AI Engineer
HTML:
BAS Group is een AWS Enterprise-organisatie die volop inzet op AI-gedreven automatisering. We hebben inmiddels drie AI-agents succesvol gebouwd en geïmplementeerd binnen kritieke bedrijfsprocessen, en staan aan het begin van een bredere transformatie waarbij AI-agents een sleutelrol gaan spelen in efficiency, klantbediening en interne automatisering.

Als AI Engineer richt je je primair op het bouwen, uitbreiden en operationaliseren van AI-agents. Je werkt op het snijvlak van engineering, LLM-technologie, MLOps/LLMOps en data. Je ontwikkelt systemen die zelfstandig taken uitvoeren, processen automatiseren en geïntegreerd samenwerken met interne platformen zoals CRM, ERP, orderverwerking, digitale diensten en supportprocessen. Je experimenteert niet alleen, maar zorgt ervoor dat AI-oplossingen productie-klaar, schaalbaar en betrouwbaar worden uitgerold en onderhouden.

Wat je precies gaat doen bij BAS Group

In deze rol bouw je nieuwe AI-agents die bedrijfsprocessen automatiseren en teams ondersteunen — van sales en operations tot support en marketing. Je verbetert en onderhoudt de bestaande drie agents, maakt ze schaalbaar en slimmer, en zorgt dat ze naadloos aansluiten op interne workflows.

Je ontwikkelt robuuste agent-architecturen voor taakautomatisering, documentverwerking, decision-assistants en interne workflow-optimalisatie, waarbij je moderne agent-frameworks zoals LangGraph inzet om multi-step reasoning, tools en bedrijfslogica te orkestreren.

Daarnaast bouw je integraties met onze kernsystemen (CRM, ERP, orderplatformen, supporttools) en zorg je dat agenten volgens best-practice LLMOps-principes — zoals monitoring, evaluation, versioning, routing en safety-mechanismen — betrouwbaar draaien in productie.

Je werkt nauw samen met Data Engineers, Analytics Engineers en het AI-team in een AWS-first omgeving, en deployt alles schaalbaar en herhaalbaar met Terraform, Git en CI/CD.

Wij bieden jou

  • Een aantrekkelijk salaris op basis van ervaring en motivatie;
  • 25 vakantiedagen plus de mogelijkheid om extra dagen te kopen;
  • Spaar- en pensioenregeling, reiskostenvergoeding;
  • Deelname aan het BAS Fit sportprogramma, vers fruit op kantoor en diverse sportactiviteiten;
  • Een prettige werkomgeving met fijne collega's en een platte organisatiestructuur;
  • Doorgroei- en trainingsmogelijkheden voor een lange termijn carrière;
  • Teamuitjes, borrels en het jaarlijkse BAS Jaarfeest.


Jouw specificaties

  • 1+ jaar ervaring als AI Engineer of 2+ jaar als Data Scientist/Data Engineer met AI-focus;
  • Sterke Python-ervaring;
  • Terraform (must) en Git (must);
  • Ervaring met AI-agents of LLM-workflows;
  • Kennis van/affiniteit met frameworks zoals LangGraph;
  • Begrip van LLMOps (evaluatie, prompts, monitoring, versioning, routing);
  • Ervaring met integraties tussen AI-modellen en operationele systemen;
  • Ervaring met AWS-deployments (Lambda, ECS, Bedrock, Sagemaker);
  • Affiniteit met automation, reliability en productie-AI;
  • In staat om je eigen data beschikbaar te stellen;
  • Basiskennis van API's en dbt.


Wij zijn BAS!

We zijn actief sinds 1962. Sindsdien vestigden wij onze naam als een betrouwbare kracht in de Automotive. Als familiebedrijf zijn wij wereldwijd actief in kopen, onderhouden en verkopen van vrachtwagens, trekkers, trailers, bouwmachines, bedrijfswagens en landbouwmachines. Al onze kennis en ervaring verwerkten we daarnaast in de ontwikkeling van basworld.com. Hier verbinden we kopers en verkopers met elkaar en helpen we hen om snel, gemakkelijk en veilig te handelen.

Onze ambitie voor BAS kent geen grenzen. Rijd jij voorop om BAS naar het volgende niveau te brengen?

Samengevat: bij BAS gaan we altijd vol gas en is geen dag hetzelfde. Met meer dan 1.000 collega's proberen wij onszelf iedere dag een stukje beter te maken voor onze klanten. Daarbij staan Brabantse nuchterheid, passie, teamwork en ondernemerschap voorop.

Title: Machine Learning & AI Engineer
Description:
At a glance

The Finance and Risk Data Domain is looking for an experienced (8+ years) machine learning engineer for the advanced analytics and AI team. The position is for 40 hours per week at hay level 11 (€ 70.000- € 100.000 yearly gross based on 40 hrs) and you would join around 10 other engineers to create AI driven solutions that empower our business.

The AI team uses its expertise to turn promising (gen)AI ideas into fully fledged products. These products are data driven and assist the business in unlocking the full value of our data in order to make better informed decisions. Several applications are already in use and are used daily by colleagues across the organization.

Your job

Your role within this team will include the design and creation of AI models/applications. You will also be expected to be able to explain the value of your designs and defend the choices made. As an expert and frontrunner on AI you should also be able to convince others of the value that your applications can bring, as well as coach and train less experienced engineers in the proper use of AI.

AI applications usually start their journey with a business requirement and an idea to have AI assist with the stated problem. Then a proof of concept phase starts, followed by a formal production design and implementation if successful. You will be involved at all stages of this pipeline, offering advice and guidance, and aiding with the design and implementation, either directly or indirectly. You will also train teams to maintain these applications.

Your profile

We heavily utilize Databricks in our environment for our data applications, using Python as our language of choice. Required skills would therefore include:


Python
Spark/PySpark
Databricks
Azure (AI services especially)
SQL
Software development practices (clean code, SOLID, patterns etc.)
Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills



AI-Assisted Development (nice to have)


Experience with AI-assisted development tools (e.g. GitHub Copilot in VS Code / IDEs)
Able to establish and maintain structured AI context (e.g. repository-level instructions, prompts, and reusable skills)
Guides AI tools by embedding team standards, architectural decisions, and best practices into reusable context
Reduces rework and inconsistency by contributing to shared AI assets (templates, examples, and patterns)
Critically evaluates AI-generated output and ensures alignment with quality, security, and maintainability expectationsIdentifies opportunities to scale AI usage across the team through structured approaches rather than ad-hoc prompting



Working environment

The F&R data domain is a multicultural environment that works in an agile way and promotes knowledge sharing and collaboration. We host department wide sessions several times a year to facilitate this and have some fun events on top.

We are offering

We believe it is important to be a good employer. Joining us means stepping into a role with impact, supported by excellent employment conditions that foster your job satisfaction, development, and wellbeing.

In addition, we offer:


An attractive gross monthly salary based on a 36‑hour work week, including holiday allowance and a flexible benefit budget.
An excellent pension scheme, ensuring that you are well prepared for the future.
Flexibility in working: working from home is possible in consultation with your team and depending on your role. We will provide an ergonomic home office setup for you.
Plenty of room for relaxation with five weeks of vacation per year, supplemented by two mandatory days off. You can also purchase up to four additional weeks of vacation annually.
Five “Banking for better days”: extra days off that you can use for personal development or volunteer work.
Personal development is key: you receive a development budget of €1,000 per year, which can accumulate up to €3,000.
An annual public transport pass with free public transportation throughout the Netherlands for both business and private use.



You can find more information about our employment conditions and salary scales in our Collective Labour Agreement (CLA), which applies to this vacancy.

Interested?

After initial screening, the interview process consists of a first interview to go over the role and relevant experience and skills in broad strokes. This is followed by a technical assignment and a technical interview. The assignment covers the basic aspects of the job and forms a starting point for the second interview. After the second interview we will usually take a decision, although on rare occasions a third interview can take place. For additional questions, you can contact the hiring manager: jasper.ris@nl.abnamro.com

Your Future: Inclusive, Innovative, Sustainable

At ABN AMRO, we believe in "Banking for better, for generations to come." Equal opportunities for everyone are a crucial foundation, as we strive for an inclusive culture where all employees feel seen, heard, and valued. Our vision of being a personal bank in the digital age aligns perfectly with the demand for surprising insights and innovative solutions, born from a diverse interplay of cultures and experiences. We focus on customer experience, sustainability, and building a future-proof bank, conducting annual reviews to ensure equal pay for equal work. Join a bank that embraces ingenuity and ambition, and make an impact with us for a better future.

If you want to apply for the B-Able or Reboot program, make sure to mention it both in the title and the content of your resume.

Disclaimer external recruitment agencies

External recruitment agencies need to have a signed agreement with ABN AMRO BANK N.V., executed by a Talent Acquisition Specialist, when submitting a resume to a vacancy. No unsolicited services or offers, please.

Title: Data Analytics Specialist (Data Analist / Data Scientist)
HTML:
Als Data Analytics Specialist / Data Analist / Data Scientist ben je verantwoordelijk voor het verzamelen, analyseren en interpreteren van data om inzichten te verkrijgen en te gebruiken voor datagedreven besluitvorming bij of voor onze gerenommerde klanten waaronder Belastingdienst, Gemeente Den Haag, diverse ministeries, Centraal Justitieel Incassobureau of VGZ. Afhankelijk van het ervaringsniveau ligt de focus op verschillende aspecten van data-analyse en data science.


Waarom past deze vacature bij jou?

Je bent analytisch, nieuwsgierig en gedreven om maatschappelijke impact te maken met data. Je schakelt gemakkelijk tussen techniek en beleid en weet abstracte analyses te vertalen naar concrete inzichten. Je draagt graag bij aan kennisdeling, continu verbeteren en datagedreven werken binnen onze klanten. Je vindt het leuk om kennis te delen met collega’s, klanten en vakgenoten. Je voelt je thuis in een informele, collegiale en professionele omgeving, waar de aandacht voor de klant en voor de medewerker centraal staan.


Wat ga je doen?

  • Verzamelen, opschonen, transformeren en valideren van data uit verschillende bronnen.
  • Toepassen van statistische methoden en data-analyse technieken om patronen, trends en inzichten uit data te halen.
  • Ontwikkelen van geavanceerde machine learning modellen.
  • Resultaten van analyses visualiseren en presenteren in heldere dashboards, rapporten en presentaties.
  • Adviseren over datagedreven besluitvorming aan management en stakeholders.
  • Coachen en (bege)leiden van medior en junior Data Specialisten.
  • Effectief samenwerken met Data Engineers, Data Stewards, business analisten en andere stakeholders.


Wat kun jij van ons verwachten?

  • Een vast dienstverband voor onbepaalde tijd, een max. salaris van € 8.000,- bonusregeling, leaseauto, pensioenregeling en maandelijkse onkostenvergoeding;
  • Opdrachtkeuzevrijheid: Jij bepaalt in overleg waar je aan werkt, met de begeleiding van een personal coach;
  • Per jaar € 5.000,- opleidingsbudget en daarnaast ook nog eens 5-10 dagen studietijd;
  • Kennissessies met vakgenoten en inhoudelijke events;
  • Minimaal 25 vakantiedagen, met de mogelijkheid om extra dagen op te bouwen of te verkopen;
  • Sociale events zoals sportdagen, weekend weg en gezellige borrels;
  • Een vestiging bij jou in de buurt.


Jouw ontwikkeling, onze prioriteit

CIMSOLUTIONS biedt jou een omgeving waarin je kunt doorgroeien naar Data Architect / Data Consultant. Je krijgt ruimte, ondersteuning en middelen om je te specialiseren en te excelleren. We bieden toegang tot diverse opleidingen en ondersteunen je met ervaren collega's. Onze slogan "Learn, create and make it work" is niet zomaar een zin – het is de kern van hoe wij werken en ontwikkelen.


CIMSOLUTIONS heeft een actief diversiteitsbeleid en streeft naar een evenwichtige verdeling van professionals naar o.a. leeftijd, gender, etnische achtergrond en cultuur, arbeidsvermogen, kennis en competenties. Hierbij benadrukken wij dat wij gelijke kansen belangrijk vinden in de selectie.


Wat breng jij mee?

  • Een afgeronde wo-opleiding in Data Science, AI, Informatiekunde, Business Analytics of vergelijkbaar;
  • Minimaal drie jaar aantoonbare ervaring in een Agile omgeving met het analyseren en interpreteren van data en het vertalen van inzichten naar concrete adviezen;
  • Vaardig in het ontwerpen van dashboards en visualisaties die inzichten helder presenteren;
  • Diepgaande kennis van statistische methoden, machine learning technieken en algoritmen;
  • Ervaring met het ontwikkelen en trainen van machine learning modellen;
  • Kennis van actuele ontwikkelingen op het gebied van data-analyse, data-ethiek en relevante wet- en regelgeving;
  • Uitstekende communicatieve vaardigheden, zowel mondeling als schriftelijk;
  • Voor senior functies ervaring met het leiden van data science projecten en kennisdeling;
  • AI-affiniteit is een pré.


Waarom CIMSOLUTIONS?

  • 15 keer Top Employer!
  • Uitstekend salaris;
  • Vrije keuze leaseauto;
  • € 5000,- opleidingsbudget;
  • Aantrekkelijke bonussen;
  • Veel sociale evenementen;
  • Uitdagende projecten;
  • Gevarieerde opdrachten;
  • Gerenommeerde klanten.


Heb je interesse?

Wij vinden het leuk om op ons hoofdkantoor of één van onze lokale vestigingen of online kennis te maken. Solliciteer via onderstaande button of neem voor meer informatie contact op met ons recruitment team via:

  • Mail: recruitment@cimsolutions.nl;
  • Telefoon: 0499-366 000;
  • of bezoek onze website: www.cimsolutions.nl/werken-bij/

Title: Software Craftsperson/Python/AI
Description:
This position is listed on behalf of a partner company, who manages all applications and next steps. Our partner is looking for a Software Craftsperson/Python/AI based in Netherlands.

This role sits at the intersection of software engineering and AI-native development, where craftsmanship and automation work hand in hand. You will contribute to building high-quality, scalable systems while actively leveraging AI as a co-creator across the software development lifecycle. The environment is highly autonomous, consultative, and impact-driven, with strong expectations around ownership and technical excellence. You will work on solving complex product and engineering problems while shaping engineering practices across teams and initiatives. The role emphasizes clean design, maintainable systems, and continuous improvement through feedback and experimentation. It is ideal for engineers who enjoy working across Python-based systems, modern AI tooling, and end-to-end product delivery in a fast-evolving technical landscape.

Accountabilities


Own the end-to-end lifecycle of engineering initiatives, ensuring delivery readiness, production stability, and smooth execution across all phases.
Design and deliver scalable, maintainable features with strong attention to architecture, quality, and long-term sustainability.
Identify technical, product, and process inefficiencies and proactively drive improvements across teams and systems.
Use AI tools actively to accelerate design, development, testing, debugging, and delivery workflows.
Contribute to DevEx and delivery improvements using modern engineering practices, including DORA metrics and flow optimization.
Support estimation, planning, and vertical slicing discussions to ensure clear, incremental delivery of value.
Provide technical leadership through mentoring, feedback, and guidance across team and pod-level initiatives.
Collaborate with stakeholders to clarify requirements, resolve ambiguity, and align on outcomes.
Influence engineering standards including code quality, testing approaches, and system design practices.


Requirements


4+ years of software engineering experience, including 2+ years working hands-on with AI/ML systems in production environments.
Strong proficiency in Python or TypeScript (with willingness to work across both), and solid fundamentals in data structures, algorithms, and software design.
Hands-on experience building production applications using LLMs (e.g., GPT, Claude, or similar) for tasks such as document processing, extraction, or classification.
Strong experience in prompt engineering and improving structured outputs from LLMs for real-world business use cases.
Experience with LLM orchestration tools and frameworks such as LangChain, LlamaIndex, or similar, and familiarity with vector databases like Pinecone, Qdrant, or PgVector.
Working knowledge of LLMOps practices including CI/CD, prompt versioning, evaluation, monitoring, and cost optimization.
Experience designing scalable backend systems, APIs, and data pipelines in production environments.
Familiarity with Agile/XP practices, continuous delivery, and collaborative engineering workflows.
Strong communication skills with the ability to work effectively in cross-functional, client-facing environments.
Experience using version control systems (Git), writing technical documentation, and working in modern cloud-based infrastructure.


Benefits


Fully remote-first work environment with flexible scheduling across time zones.
Opportunity to work in an AI-native engineering culture focused on craftsmanship and quality.
Twice-yearly in-person co-working sessions and annual company retreat (fully covered).
Dedicated learning and development budget to support continuous skill growth.
Sponsorship for conferences, talks, and external learning opportunities.
Comprehensive medical and term insurance coverage.
Home office support and employee-friendly leave policies.
Strong engineering culture centered on pairing, experimentation, and continuous improvement.


How Jobgether Works

We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.

We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

Why Apply Through Jobgether?

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

  • Home office support and employee-friendly leave policies.

How Jobgether Works

We use an AI-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.

We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!

Why Apply Through Jobgether?

Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.

We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses and identifying potential inconsistencies or verification signals in application materials based on available information. Title: Data Scientist
Description:
Data Scientist

Location: Flexible

Salary: Competitive with comprehensive benefits




This is an exciting opportunity to join a large‑scale organisation where you will shape and deliver end‑to‑end data science solutions. You will work across engineering, deployment, modelling, and production, giving you the chance to see your work make a real operational impact at scale.




The Company

They are a well‑established organisation undergoing significant investment in data, analytics, and AI. With large and complex datasets, they are building modern, scalable data products that underpin key decisions across the business. You will join a high‑performing, collaborative environment where experimentation, innovation, and continuous improvement are encouraged.




The Role

You will

• Design, build, and deploy end‑to‑end data science solutions from discovery to production.

• Develop robust models and scalable data pipelines in collaboration with engineering teams.

• Work on cloud‑based environments to implement reliable, maintainable, and well‑tested code.

• Translate business problems into analytical approaches and deliver solutions that drive measurable value.

• Own projects through the full lifecycle, ensuring models are production‑ready and continuously optimised.

You will need

• Strong commercial experience delivering data science solutions in production environments.

• Hands‑on experience with machine learning modelling, model evaluation, and operationalisation.

• Proficiency in Python and core data science libraries.

• Experience working across the stack including data engineering, APIs, deployment, and monitoring.

• Familiarity with cloud platforms and modern development practices such as CI/CD.

• A collaborative approach and the ability to translate complex concepts into clear actions.




What They Offer

• Competitive salary and benefits package.

• Opportunity to work with large‑scale datasets and modern tooling.

• Real ownership of end‑to‑end projects and strong career progression.

• Collaborative culture that supports learning, innovation, and continuous development.

Title: Senior Data Scientist Machine Learning
Description:
Senior Data Scientist (ML) | Major Dutch Bank




A major Dutch bank is accelerating the next wave of AI-driven financial crime detection, and they need experienced Data Scientists to help build it. This is not a maintenance role - the team is actively developing and scaling machine learning models that change how transaction monitoring and financial crime analysis gets done, with real business impact measured and tracked.




About the role

You will be joining the Financial Crime unit at a pivotal moment. The team is executing a GenAI Acceleration plan that moves beyond traditional automation towards intelligent, data-driven systems. For the ML track specifically, the focus is on developing and productionising machine learning models in a big data environment, reducing manual effort for DFC analysts and improving the quality and speed of financial crime decisions.

You will:

Develop, train, and productionise machine learning models that deliver pre-estimated business value within FC
Work with large, complex datasets in a big data environment using Python, PySpark, Azure, and Databricks
Collaborate with business developers and other data scientists in a multidisciplinary team
Operate independently on high-impact use cases while contributing to a scalable AI ecosystem




Who are you?

Master's or PhD in Computer Science, Data Science, or a related field
4+ years of experience as a Data Scientist, including experience productionising ML models
Proficient in Python; PySpark experience strongly preferred
Familiar with Azure and other technologies including GIT
Up to date with recent developments in machine learning and comfortable with knowledge of IT architecture
Able to work independently and take ownership of use cases end to end
Experienced working in large, complex corporate environments
Experience in FEC, KYC, CDD, or AML is a bonus, not a requirement




About Levy Professionals

Levy Professionals is a specialist staffing agency with offices in Amsterdam and London, focused exclusively on placing technology and data professionals at leading financial institutions across the Netherlands. We work with some of the most respected names in Dutch banking and asset management, and we pride ourselves on transparent, direct relationships with both our candidates and clients. We take the time to understand your career goals and match you to assignments where you can make a genuine impact.

Title: AI Engineer
HTML:
Heb jij een passie voor de nieuwste AI-technologieën en wil je zowel technisch als strategisch uitgedaagd worden? Wij van Datacation geloven erin dat je door de brug te slaan tussen bedrijfsuitdagingen en de bijbehorende data écht impact kunt maken! Voor ons team in Eindhoven zoeken we een gedreven AI Engineer met een specialisatie in Natural Language Processing (NLP) en Large Language Models (LLMs).


Over Datacation

Datacation is de data- en AI-partner waar inhoud, kwaliteit en eigenaarschap centraal staan. Wij helpen organisaties om data structureel in te zetten voor betere besluitvorming, van strategie en architectuur tot implementatie en adoptie.

In de afgelopen vijf jaar zijn we uitgegroeid tot een team van ruim 40 collega’s, werkzaam vanuit onze kantoren in Eindhoven en Amsterdam.


Functieomschrijving

Als AI Engineer help je onze klanten het volledige potentieel van hun data te ontsluiten met geavanceerde AI-technieken. Je werkt aan complexe, real-world uitdagingen en loopt voorop in een snel evoluerend vakgebied. Je werkzaamheden bestaan onder andere uit:

  • Het vertalen van complexe business uitdagingen naar concrete, data-gedreven AI-oplossingen;
  • Het ontwikkelen en implementeren van geavanceerde oplossingen met Large Language Models (LLMs) en technieken zoals Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG);
  • Meedenken over de juiste data- en modelarchitectuur voor schaalbare en robuuste oplossingen;
  • Nauw samenwerken met onze senior experts en de klant om innovatieve oplossingen te leveren die direct waarde toevoegen;
  • Het presenteren van je ideeën en resultaten aan zowel een technisch als niet-technisch publiek.


Wat verwachten we van jou?

  • Een MSc of PhD in een relevant vakgebied zoals Data science, Artificial Intelligence of Computer Science;
  • Minimaal 3 jaar ervaring in een vergelijkbare rol (Data Scientist, Data Engineer of Software Engineer);
  • Een gedegen begrip van fundamentele AI-modellen, waaronder Transformers, Text Embeddings en op GPT-gebaseerde modellen;
  • Uitgebreide ervaring met Python volgens industriestandaarden en een goede beheersing van SQL;
  • Ervaring met cloudtools zoals Azure, AWS of Databricks;
  • Vaardig in het werken met AI-ontwikkelbibliotheken en -frameworks zoals TensorFlow, PyTorch, LangChain, LlamaIndex en Hugging Face;
  • Een sterke basis in software engineering principes en design patterns, en de praktische toepassing hiervan in projecten;
  • Ervaring met het in productie brengen, monitoren en finetunen van AI-oplossingen;
  • Uitstekende beheersing van de Nederlandse taal in woord en geschrift;
  • Een leergierige, ondernemende en proactieve instelling.


Wat kun je van ons verwachten?

  • De mogelijkheid om je te ontwikkelen tot een expert in het snelgroeiende veld van AI;
  • Technisch uitdagende projecten binnen een breed scala aan sectoren;
  • Veel autonomie en verantwoordelijkheid in een platte en dynamische organisatie;
  • Samenwerken in een enthousiast en hecht team van technische collega’s op ons kantoor op de High Tech Campus in Eindhoven;
  • De ruimte om te experimenteren met de nieuwste technologieën en hierin door te groeien;
  • Verschillende uitjes per jaar met als hoogtepunt de jaarlijkse wintersport;
  • Deelgenoot worden van ons bedrijf met een topsportmentaliteit.


Voldoe je niet aan alle eisen, maar denk je toch een goede match te zijn? Overtuig ons en solliciteer!

Title: Data Scientist
HTML:
Wat ga je doen?

Wil jij bouwen aan schaalbare AI-oplossingen en werken op het snijvlak van data science en software development? Dan is deze rol echt iets voor jou.

Zo maak jij het verschil in je werkdag:

Binnen deze functie werk je primair aan het ontwikkelen en verbeteren van ons data science platform en van de AI-producten die we daarop ontwikkelen. In deze rol beweeg je duidelijk richting de softwareontwikkelaarskant van data science. Jouw focus ligt op het bouwen, testen en deployen van robuuste AI oplossingen.

Deze rolt valt binnen team Data Science & Insights, een team dat analyses uitvoert, modellen maakt, en AI-oplossingen neerzet voor diverse afdelingen binnen ons servicekantoor. Het team maakt onderdeel uit van de afdeling Data, BI & Analytics, een afdeling die onder meer het centrale dataplatform beheert waar je ontzettend veel data kunt vinden die PLUS gebruikt om steeds beter onze klanten in de supermarkt te kunnen bedienen. Bijvoorbeeld door te zorgen dat het juiste assortiment in elke winkel te vinden is.

In deze veelzijdige rol ga je onder andere:

  • Bijdragen aan de doorontwikkeling van ons data science platform op Databricks en Microsoft Azure;
  • Het verder professionaliseren van onze DTAP-straat met betrouwbare en schaalbare deployments;
  • Werken aan het door-ontwikkelen en verbeteren van AI en machine learning oplossingen;
  • Samen met het team werken aan nieuwe waardevolle, productiewaardige oplossingen.

Wie ben je?

  • Je hebt minimaal 2 jaar aantoonbare werkervaring met het neerzetten van schaalbare AI-oplossingen binnen Azure en Databricks;
  • Je hebt aantoonbare ervaring met minimaal de programmeertaal Python en IaC;
  • Je bent leergierig, beschikt over een creatieve en innovatieve aanpak en werkt graag samen met jouw teamgenoten.

Wat bieden we je?

  • Een bruto jaarsalaris tussen € 49.000 en € 70.000 (excl. vakantiegeld) op basis van 36 uur per week en op basis van je kennis en ervaring;
  • Variabele beloningsregeling van 3%;
  • 6 weken vakantie per kalenderjaar bij een fulltime dienstverband;
  • 8% vakantiegeld;
  • 10% korting op je boodschappen bij PLUS;
  • Hybride werken voor een goede werk-privébalans;
  • € 500 voor je thuiswerkplek;
  • Laptop en telefoon van de zaak;
  • Opleidingen en trainingen via de PLUS Academie;
  • Deelname aan activiteiten en netwerkevents.

Interesse?

Zet jij de extra stap samen met ons? Solliciteer dan direct! Twijfel je nog of de rol helemaal bij je past? Ook dan moedigen we je aan te solliciteren.

Vragen? Neem dan contact op met Francien Barske (senior corporate recruiter) via fbarske@plusretail.nl.

Met deze vacature willen wij zelf onze nieuwe collega’s werven. Dit is dan ook géén oproep voor acquisitie.

Title: Artificial Intelligence Engineer (Remote)
Description:
Role: Artificial Intelligence Engineer (Remote)
Location: Remote (Work from Anywhere)
Payout: $30 - $100 per hour







Role Overview:

We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking a Machine Learning Engineer to work on a contractor basis. As a Machine Learning Engineer, you will apply your expertise to help train next-generation AI systems, shaping how models learn, reason, and perform through high-quality, real-world input. Your work will contribute to the development of frontier AI models that address real-world business problems in various domains such as finance, healthcare, engineering, and more.




Key Responsibilities:

• Develop, train, and deploy machine learning models using TensorFlow and Scikit-learn to address real-world business problems.

• Conduct comprehensive data preprocessing, including data cleaning, transformation, and feature engineering to ensure high-quality inputs for model development.

• Collaborate with data scientists, data engineers, and business analysts to understand requirements and translate them into scalable ML solutions.

• Continuously monitor, evaluate, and refine model performance to ensure accuracy, efficiency, and reliability in production environments.

• Document model development, deployment, and performance to facilitate knowledge sharing and future improvements.




Required Skills & Qualifications:

• Strong understanding of machine learning concepts, including supervised and unsupervised learning, neural networks, and deep learning.

• Proficiency in TensorFlow and Scikit-learn for building and deploying machine learning models.

• Experience with data preprocessing, including data cleaning, transformation, and feature engineering.

• Excellent collaboration and communication skills to work with cross-functional teams.

• Strong problem-solving skills to identify and resolve complex technical issues.




More About the Opportunity:

This role offers a unique opportunity to work with a global leader in the AI industry, contributing to the development of next-generation AI systems that address real-world business problems. You will have the chance to apply your expertise to shape how models learn, reason, and perform, and collaborate with a global network of experts in the field.




Equal Opportunity Employer:

We hire based on skills and expertise. All qualified candidates are welcome regardless of background, experience, or prior employment history. Applications are reviewed solely on demonstrated technical ability and qualifications.

Title: AI Evaluator (Remote)
Description:
Role: AI Evaluator (Remote)
Location: Remote (Work from Anywhere)
Payout: $22 - $70/hour




Role Overview:

We are hiring for one of our clients, seeking an AI Evaluation Specialist to work on a contractor basis. Your expertise will directly shape the development of next-generation AI systems by providing high-quality, real-world input that enhances how models learn, reason, and perform. This role is critical to improving AI outputs across diverse domains, including finance, healthcare, and engineering. No prior AI experience is required — your domain knowledge is the key asset.




Key Responsibilities:

• Review and critically assess AI-generated outputs for quality, clarity, usability, and overall user experience.

• Identify inconsistencies, weaknesses, and opportunities for improvement across content types and visual experiences.

• Apply structured evaluation guidelines and provide insightful, nuanced feedback to inform model improvements.

• Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define and refine quality standards, scoring criteria, and review processes.

• Maintain high accuracy and consistency across evaluations while adhering to established benchmarks.




Required Skills & Qualifications:

• Demonstrated critical thinking ability to analyze complex outputs and identify areas for enhancement.

• Strong editorial judgment to assess content for correctness, coherence, and relevance to intended use cases.

• Proven experience in content evaluation, including written and verbal communication skills.

• Exceptional attention to detail to ensure evaluations meet high standards of accuracy and reliability.

• Ability to work independently in a remote environment while meeting deadlines.




More About the Opportunity:

This role offers a unique opportunity to contribute to a global platform that bridges human expertise with AI development. You will join a network of top domain experts whose contributions directly train and refine AI models used by leading organizations. The work is project-based, allowing for flexibility while making a measurable impact on the future of AI.
